steps: Check your name in the Voter List on the ECI website.
Identify your Polling Station and Booth number.
Bring your Voter ID card (EPIC) or an alternative approved identity document.
Go to the Polling Station on the election day during polling hours.
Get your finger marked with indelible ink by the polling officer.
Proceed to the voting compartment and cast your vote on the EVM/VVPAT.
documents: Passbook with photograph issued by Bank/Post Office

steps: Check Bhopal Municipal Corporation voter list.
Locate your booth (often in local Government schools or Community Halls).
Follow local administrative guidelines for queue management.
